channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Iza-Bren Outperforms Chemo in Second-Line Esophageal Cancer
item.description: A phase 3 trial shows izalontamab brengitecan is superior to chemotherapy for previously treated esophageal squamous cell carcinoma, though questions remain.

item.title: Cancer Researchers Present Advances and Emerging Treatments
item.description: At their annual summit in Chicago, cancer researchers highlighted several treatment breakthroughs, including preliminary but promising results.

item.title: Up to Half of Life-Threatening Kidney Disease Cases Remain Undiagnosed, Experts Reveal
item.description: Chronic kidney disease, now the ninth leading cause of death globally, is significantly underdiagnosed, endangering millions of patients worldwide.

item.title: Popular GLP-1 Drug May Slow Down Biological Aging, Analysis Indicates
item.description: GLP-1 receptor agonists, known for treating obesity and lowering blood sugar, may also slow biological aging, according to a new analysis.
